title: Gloomfall
description: Slightly overhaul hostile mobs attack on player, improve deepslate ambience and significantly buff hostile mobs under deepslate level.
body:
# This mod can be used as a cilent side mode if you only want music when on a sever.
- Almost every features can be tuned or disabled to fit your liking.

- When under y level 0, for the first time, vanilla musics stop instantly, playing a glitch sound then some seconds later the deepslate music will play

- If you dont want deep music to play in a certain area go to config or through mod menu, then you can add your custom excluded area, the radius is calculated as a circle.

- New Effects Added:
  + Vulnerability: taken from zombie attack, very rare to happen above y0, but very common under y0, this effect makes you take 25% more damage and -1 attack damage.
  + Concussed: speed reduced by 20%, unable to do any right click interaction, taken from creeper explosion.
  + Splintered: Disable Jumping, reduce health regeneration (natural and food) by 40%, taken from skeleton.
- All hostile mobs resist 72% damage from projectiles.

- Mobs stats are also buffed under y0, check config for more info.

- CUSTOM MUSIC CAN BE ADDED: Open the mod file with rar, go to assets/ and read the .txt file
- Mod default setting can be unbalanced but you can change it to whatever in the config.
  
# Sounds Credit:
- Deepslate Music by techtheist: https://freemusicarchive.org/music/techtheist/fma2021-part-2/dark-ambient-cave-experience/
- Splintered Sound Effect by Deathscyp: https://freesound.org/people/Deathscyp/sounds/443288/
- Concussed Sound Effect (Flashbang 808) by 1Love: https://freesound.org/people/1LOVE/sounds/582505/(only modified the .wav to .ogg)
- Vulnerability Effect from minecraft shulker
- Glitchy Transition Sound 1 by hello_flowers: https://freesound.org/people/hello_flowers/sounds/27426/
- Glitchy Transition Sound 2 by CURTYWURTY: https://freesound.org/people/CURTYWURTY/sounds/677947/
----
Note: only the code is under LGPL-3.0-only, assets are completely free to use and modify without the need to credit or follow the LGPL-3.0-only license, just make sure to follow the original custom sounds license used in this mod.
